headline: Arta Finance positions AI as 'Chief of Staff' for ultra-high-net-worth clients
summary: Arta Finance, the AI-native wealth platform founded by ex-Google executive Caesar Sengupta, has repositioned its core AI product as an AI Chief of Staff for ultra-high-net-worth individuals — a personal AI that manages the full complexity of their financial life, from tax optimization to private equity deal flow to estate planning coordination. The reframe moves Arta away from 'robo-advisor' comparisons and toward the concierge/family-office model. The product integrates with external custodians, tax advisors, and legal teams, acting as the coordination layer. Arta claims its AI-driven model delivers family-office quality services at 10% of the cost.

key_stat.label: Cost reduction vs traditional family office
